texto: My purpose is to serve a purpose to humanity
autor: therefore I’ve made it my goal to educate myself to the best of my abilities so that I can convey to my children the importance of knowledge and personal responsibility
explicacao: Citação de therefore I’ve made it my goal to educate myself to the best of my abilities so that I can convey to my children the importance of knowledge and personal responsibility sobre temas ligados a amor. “My purpose is to serve a purpose to humanity” articula amor, travis-culliton, why-i-love-my-prozac em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como why-i-love-my-prozac.
